steps.title: This is a custom protocol that...
steps.instruction: This is a custom protocol that automates certain steps of the Omega Mag-Bind Bacterial DNA 96 Kit on the OT-2 robot. This kit allows rapid isolation of genomic DNA from bacterial samples. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: The total number of DNA samples. Samples must range between 1 (minimum) and 12 (maximum). * `P300 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `P1000 Single GEN2 Pipette Mount Position`: The position of the pipette, either left or right. * `Magnetic Module Engage Height`: The height the magnets will raise on the magnetic module. ---

steps.title: Transfer 5 uL of RNase A...
steps.instruction: Transfer 5 uL of RNase A and then mix thoroughly 20 times.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer 400 uL of MSL Buffer to all samples
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 uL of MSL Buffer to all samples.

steps.title: Transfer 10 uL of Mag-Bind particles...
steps.instruction: Transfer 10 uL of Mag-Bind particles to all samples and mix thoroughly 20 times.

steps.title: Transfer 528 uL of Ethanol and mix thoroughly 20 times
steps.instruction: Transfer 528 uL of Ethanol and mix thoroughly 20 times.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer 400 uL of SPM buffer to samples
steps.instruction: Transfer 400 uL of SPM buffer to samples.

steps.title: Resuspend magnetic beads and then incubate...
steps.instruction: Resuspend magnetic beads and then incubate for 3 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Air dry magnetic beads for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Air dry magnetic beads for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Air dry beads for 15 minutes until they dry
steps.instruction: Air dry beads for 15 minutes until they dry.
